layout.name: sound
layout.title: Sound Effect
layout.tooltip: The sound that plays when an NPC spawns.

layout.name: npc
layout.title: NPC
layout.tooltip: The NPC spawned once this spawner is triggered.

layout.name: speed
layout.title: Speed
layout.tooltip: The X-Speed of the spawned NPC.

layout.name: enabled
layout.title: Enabled
layout.tooltip: When disabled, this spawner will instead disable any existing effects of this kind.

layout.name: homing
layout.title: Homing
layout.tooltip: When checked, the NPCs will be spawned close to the player's Y-Coordinate.

layout.name: side
layout.title: Side
layout.tooltip:
What side of the screen should the NPCs be spawned on?

Random: picks the left or right side at random

Direction setting: uses the NPC's direction setting

Alternating: alternates between the left and right side, using the NPC's direction setting as the starting side

Opposite from the player: picks the side furthest away from the player chosen by homing

Same as player: picks the side closest to the player chosen by homing
